articles.title: Graham Platner denies hurting ex-girlfriend and says he will not quit Senate race

summary: Graham Platner denies allegations of physical harm against an ex-girlfriend during a recent interview.

He confirmed he will continue his Senate campaign despite the allegations, affecting voter sentiment.
